merged_events.event_description: The American Legation in Ottawa was established when William Phillips presented his credentials as Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary.

evidence.quote: The American Legation in Ottawa was established on June 1, 1927, when William Phillips presented his credentials as Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary.

merged_events.event_description: The American Legation in Ottawa was elevated to Embassy status when Ray Atherton presented his credentials as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary.

evidence.quote: The American Legation in Ottawa was elevated to Embassy status on November 19, 1943, when Ray Atherton presented his credentials as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary.

matched.notes: Exact match on date (1927-06-01) and status (Legation). Both describe the establishment of the American Legation in Ottawa when William Phillips presented credentials.
Exact match on date (1943-11-19) and status (Embassy). Both describe the elevation of the Legation to Embassy status when Ray Atherton presented credentials.
